testing_steps: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that runs the full cycle against http://localhost:8899: POST /products/add (capture id) → GET it back → PUT an update → GET again → DELETE → final GET.
3. Assert every read-back reflects the preceding write per the documented persistence semantics (created fields present, update visible, delete behavior as documented).
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/verify-crud-operation-integrity/cases.json — this run recorded 0 of 9 checks failing.
